candidate_definition_hints.text: Popular Kubernetes CRDs (CustomResourceDefinition) in JSON schema format.

This repository aggregates hundreds of popular Kubernetes CRDs (`CustomResourceDefinition`) in JSON schema format. These schemas can be used by various tools such as [Datree](https://github.com/datreeio/datree), [Kubeconform](https://github.com/yannh/kubeconform) and [Kubeval](h…
